description:
A receipt from vendor Gemini Furniture has arrived with systemic quality defects. As Quality Manager, execute the complete CAPA (Corrective and Preventive Action) lifecycle in Odoo Quality (http://localhost:8069, admin/admin).

Mark quality check "Visual Inspection - Cabinet Finish" as Failed. Create quality alert "Lot NCR-2024-1247 - Cabinet Weld Defect" for product Cabinet with Doors: set vendor to Gemini Furniture, priority to Urgent (3 stars). Set corrective action: "Quarantine remaining units from lot NCR-2024-1247. Re-inspect all Gemini Furniture cabinet stock. Issue SCAR-2024-0847 with 15-business-day supplier response deadline." Set preventive action: "Mandate first-article inspection for next 6 Gemini Furniture deliveries. Add dimensional and visual QCPs to receiving workflow. Require certificate of conformance with each shipment."

Implement preventive controls: create QCP "Weld Integrity Verification - Cabinet" for product Cabinet with Doors, operation Receipts, type Measure, with instructions: "Measure weld bead width at joints A, B, C per drawing DWG-CB-0088. Record values in mm." Set failure message: "REJECT: Weld non-conformance. Quarantine unit, file NCR per QP-NCR-001." Create QCP "Surface Finish Gate - Acoustic Screens" for product Acoustic Bloc Screens, operation Receipts, type Pass - Fail. Set failure message: "REJECT: Surface defect. Log code SF-003, quarantine unit."

Create quality alert team "Supplier Incident Response" and assign the alert to it. Advance the alert from New through In Progress to Done to complete the CAPA closure.
